LJCPerson.summary: Represents a person data object with change tracking.

DefaultCtor.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LJCPerson class.

ParameterizedCtor.summary: Initializes an LJCPerson instance with specific values.

CopyCtor.summary: Initializes a new instance by copying another instance.

Clone.summary: Creates a deep copy of the current object.

SetOriginalState.summary: Sets the original values to match the current property values and clears the list of changed properties.

ID.summary: Gets or sets the primary key ID.

ParentID.summary: Gets or sets the foreign key Parent ID.

Name.summary: Gets or sets the person's name (trimmed).

Description.summary: Gets or sets the person's description (trimmed).

ChangedProperties.summary: Gets or sets the list of property names that have changed.
